title: mimulus subuniflorus
intro: Mimulus subuniflorus, also known as monkey flower, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe anxiety and stress, and its potential to aid in the treatment of conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Mimulus subuniflorus include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
